visual_checks.name: desktop full-score integration
visual_checks.details: song-detail-after-merge-desktop-top.png shows title, artist, form digest, rehearsal labels, Melody, Piano RH, Piano LH, four-measure systems, and compact chord symbols with no error overlay.

visual_checks.name: mobile score width and readability
visual_checks.details: song-detail-after-merge-mobile.png at 390px has document width 390px, score/SVG width 342px, no overflow, no alert, visible form, and three-measure compact systems.

visual_checks.name: mobile songs catalog
